Uniswap v4 hook that embeds reputation-gated AI agents into every swap. DATA FLOW: \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500  [Offchain Agent]      observes pending swap in mempool      runs MEV detection / fee optimization      signs AgentIntent{swapId, mevFlag, feeOverrideBps, timestamp}      calls registerIntent() \u2014 lands in block N-1  [Block N \u2014 PoolManager calls hook]      beforeSwap():          1. reads pool config \u2192 gets assignedAgentId          2. calls ERC-8004 ReputationRegistry.getScore(agentId)          3. if score < minRepScore \u2192 revert (agent not qualified)          4. reads pendingIntents[swapId]          5. if mevFlag=true \u2192 revert MEVDetected (sandwich blocked)          6. if feeOverrideBps set \u2192 return as lpFeeOverride      afterSwap():          1. computes slippage saved vs baseline fee          2. computes agentFee = amountIn * agentFeeBps / 10000          3. transfers USDC to agent wallet (ERC-8183 settlement simulation)          4. calls ERC-8004 ReputationRegistry.recordEvent(agentId, jobId, perfScore)          5. emits AgentSettled \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/AgentSwapHook.sol":"AgentSwapHook"},"evmVersion":"cancun","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":false,"runs":200},"remappings":[":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"]},"sources":{"contracts/AgentSwapHook.sol":{"keccak256":"0x78a458a216433dfe0037f208a835a57a34d2c548894eb35c9888aa599feaed43","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://78fd0c0c8eb38a02a89d87cc7196921c4744a9b3e9bb424469a35bb91e364b0e","dweb:/ipfs/QmRCNFYg1ppz7tHBwK2wtckcXfHhBRXfga7ekMhN1uaiLq"]},"contracts/interfaces/IERC8004.sol":{"keccak256":"0xb77f6355f32294c70cc179bbf3db986284ef154bd64fc8d2b714b041c3971726","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://1ef4daa532ba5e806ed9ac56ce9740611832f1f98bf716fcf52d795fcfaae04c","dweb:/ipfs/QmbcyLno9PsLAVRpQoSikfec2AntsXZ2ptRyHFf9o61sAV"]},"contracts/interfaces/IERC8183.sol":{"keccak256":"0xf3212c868f79a5fec8565418e1013f67f1d8926117ba8ab1c72390bf369f209d","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://fc715fc21ecc76b5a843fd2deed1060eb064ace1096539b5533f394c2665cf92","dweb:/ipfs/QmQeqXFAoy25xLRFF3NfNM6kZqX6CGkz5AQegtKxn8RfPo"]},"contracts/interfaces/IUniswapV4.sol":{"keccak256":"0x083f99d3e55fd7607091fefd1291de1c4333486abd5b68da7a32444e058bb1c7","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://61babc0c9b5244e2d91d3ed7e56dafcd6e4bef9c672197733049d3eaf21d40b2","dweb:/ipfs/QmQSxjocxkdWCcrNANT8Hgz7euusNd7dbiCBuwBk3d6hMc"]}},"version":1}
